accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text including quantities, dates, and agency roles.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; summary is fully grounded in the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill amends the USEC Privatization Act to ban Russian low-enriched uranium imports.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes amendment to USEC Privatization Act with conforming amendments described.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately covers DOE national security/nonproliferation exceptions, non-uranium isotopes, and waiver conditions.

effective_dates.why: Notes 90-day effective date, waiver termination Jan 1 2028, and prohibition sunset Dec 31 2040.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions: ban, anti-circumvention, waiver, caps, enforcement, congressional notification.

concise.why: No padding; all content adds value.

correct_entities.why: All agencies and statutes correctly named.

correct_figures.why: All kilogram quantities and dates match the bill.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
